Cross-casino & nonexistent -> 404; integrity_failure -> 200. NFR-1 sentinel 2^63-1 proven via CLOSER chipset {'1000000000':9223372036,'1':854775807} (sums to sentinel via BigInt products) -> serialized as string '9223372036854775807'. KEY DB FACT: int8 amount_cents returns as LOSSY JS number via PostgREST and total_cents is int4 — chipset BigInt aggregation is the only lossless path to a 64-bit-max value; route String(bigint) serialization is the boundary fix. Added createRoleUser() to fixtures/tia-seed.ts.

SEED (tia-inventory-only-seed.ts): company->casino(status active)->casino_settings->pit_boss auth user+staff (ADR-024 two-phase: createUser w/ app_metadata{casino_id,staff_role:pit_boss}, create staff, updateUserById stamp staff_id)->approved_email_allowlist insert {status:'active'} (NOTE: allowed values are 'active'|'revoked', NOT 'approved')->ONE active gaming_table (pit:'PIT-A')->ONE RUNDOWN table_session->open snapshot total_cents 30000 + close snapshot total_cents 100000, linked via opening/closing_inventory_snapshot_id. Derivation: inventory_only, partial = closer-opener = 70000 = '$700' (EXPECTED_PARTIAL_RESULT_DISPLAY). Exports createModeBConfirmPath(email,next) = admin.generateLink magiclink -> /auth/confirm?token_hash=<properties.hashed_token>&type=magiclink&next=/start (email-inbox substitute; real verifyOtp sets real cookies = genuine Mode B, NOT dev-bypass, NOT Mode C; R-3 compliant).

SPEC FLOW: createModeBConfirmPath -> page.goto(confirmPath,{waitUntil:'commit'}).catch(()=>{}) [confirm route 30x-redirects /auth/confirm->/start->/pit, initial nav aborts] -> waitForURL(/\/pit/) -> networkidle -> page.keyboard.press('Control+2') [sidebar tabs are COLLAPSED icon-only, no accessible name; Ctrl+<n> shortcut from panel-container.tsx switches activePanel, 2=inventory] -> assert 'Session Rundown' + 'Partial Table Result' + '$700' + missing-drop disclosure visible; assert /win\/loss unavailable/i, 'Win/Loss'(exact), 'Final Win/Loss'(exact) count 0; 'Partial Table Result' count 1.

KEY ENV/ARCH FACTS DISCOVERED:
- BLOCKER WAS: .env.local ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true -> lib/server-actions/middleware/auth.ts withAuth() ignores real session, injects DEV_RLS_CONTEXT (casino ca000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 / admin) + service client -> all routes run as DEMO casino. Diagnosed via in-browser page.request probe: current-session 401 'Only pit_boss or admin' (set_rls_context_from_staff raises under service-role via mapRpcError table-session.ts:202/290), accounting-projection 404 SESSION_NOT_FOUND. Verified RPC rpc_get_current_table_session WORKS with a real pit_boss Bearer JWT (returns the RUNDOWN session). So seed/logic correct; only server auth mode was wrong.
- isDevAuthBypassEnabled() = isDevMode() && process.env.ENABLE_DEV_AUTH==='true'. Next @next/env does NOT override a shell-set var, so ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=false npm run dev disables bypass while keeping real auth.
- App login is OTP/magic-link ONLY (no password). e2e/fixtures/auth.ts authenticateAndNavigate (password #login-email/#login-password/'Sign in') is STALE vs current login UI — do NOT use for Mode B here.
- Pilot gate: /start (app/(public)/start/page.tsx) checks ACTIVE staff binding FIRST -> if found, redirect /pit on THAT casino (no demo auto-bind). Demo auto-bind to DEMO_CASINO_ID only fires when NO active staff. Allowlist gate bypassed when NODE_ENV=development (isDevAuth), but seed approves anyway.
- /pit auto-selects tables[0] (pit-panels-client.tsx:236-245) so single-table seed needs no manual selection. current-session route role-gates pit_boss/admin; rpc filter status IN(OPEN,ACTIVE,RUNDOWN).
- DIAGNOSTIC page.request block was REMOVED from spec (clean).
